category_sources: source_facts.description says libpano builds panoramic images from overlapping images.
display_name_sources: source_facts.source-archive names libpano13 releases; source_facts.name gives the Homebrew formula as libpano.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Panotools site; SourceForge hosts the official libpano13 project code browser.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge Panotools code browser identifies the libpano13 Mercurial repository under the panotools project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies panorama construction from overlapping images; source_facts.executables lists panorama-related CLI tools.
